quote: May this new chapter of your life be filled with beautiful stories, unforgettable adventures, and pages of happiness.
author: Birthday Wish

quote: A birthday is like the first page of a new book. Write a story this year that even your future self will love to reread.
author: Birthday Wish

quote: Just like the best books, your life keeps getting better with every new chapter. Happy Birthday to a wonderful soul.
author: Birthday Wish

quote: May your life always be filled with stories worth telling, dreams worth chasing, and pages worth turning.
author: Birthday Wish

quote: Some people collect things. You collect stories, ideas, and dreams from books — and that makes you special.
author: Birthday Wish

quote: Another year, another chapter. May this one be your most magical story yet.
author: Birthday Wish
